title: strumaria tenella subsp. orientalis
intro: Strumaria tenella subsp. orientalis is a species of flowering plant that belongs to the genus Strumaria, commonly known as the 'Yellow Desert Calla' or 'Yellow Desert Candle'. It is a small, bulbous perennial plant with yellow or greenish-yellow flowers, native to the arid regions of southern Africa. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its anti-inflammatory and antibacterial properties, which are said to contribute to its health benefits, such as reducing fever and alleviating respiratory issues. Strumaria tenella subsp. orientalis can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, or tinctures, and it is also used in traditional remedies for its medicinal properties.
